label: Hong Kong Court Rejects Activist Appeals in National Security Case
summary: A Hong Kong court rejected all remaining appeals in the city's major national security case, upholding convictions and sentences for pro-democracy activists.

timeline.event: Hong Kong 47 Subversion Case Appeals Rejected
timeline.description: Hong Kong's Court of Appeal upheld prison terms for 12 activists involved in the 'Hong Kong 47' subversion case.

timeline.event: Jimmy Lai Sedition Conviction Upheld by Top Court
timeline.description: Hong Kong's top court upheld the sedition and collusion conviction of pro-democracy publisher Jimmy Lai.
